title: CFTR / elexacaftor / tezacaftor / ivacaftor
summary: Patients with the rs121908751 AA genotype (two copies of the CFTR E92K variant) and cystic fibrosis may respond to elexacaftor / tezacaftor / ivacaftor treatment. FDA-approved drug labeling information indicates use of elexacaftor / tezacaftor / ivacaftor in cystic fibrosis patients with at least one copy of E92K. Other genetic and clinical factors may also influence response to elexacaftor / tezacaftor / ivacaftor.
